Package org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi

Class JsonApiRelationship

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.bean.jsonapi.JsonApiRelationship
@Marshalled public class JsonApiRelationship extends Object
Represents a JSON:API Relationship Object as defined by JSON:API v1.1 § Relationships.

A relationship carries:

  • data - resource linkage. Per spec, this can be null, a single JsonApiResourceIdentifier, or a JSON array of identifiers. Modeled here as Object.
  • links - related URLs. Each value can be either a JSON string URL or a JsonApiLink object; the field-level JsonApiLinkOrStringSwap swap handles the union.
  • meta - free-form meta bag.
See Also:
  • juneau-bean-jsonapi

      public Object getData()
      Bean property getter: data.

      Resource linkage. Per spec, this may be null, a single JsonApiResourceIdentifier, or a List&lt;JsonApiResourceIdentifier&gt;.

      The value of the data property, or null if it is not set.

      @BeanProp("links") @Swap(JsonApiLinkOrStringSwap.class) public Map<String,Object> getLinks()

      Per spec, each links value can be either a JSON string URL or a JsonApiLink object.
